title: corynephorus divaricatus subsp. oranensis
intro: Corynephorus divaricatus subsp. oranensis, also known as the Ornans hair-grass, is a type of grass native to Europe and North Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Corynephorus divaricatus subsp. oranensis include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to aid in digestion. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
